-    num_epochs = 8

+    num_epochs = 12

     best_exprate = 0.0

     global_step = 0

@@ -115,6 +115,7 @@
             f.write(json.dumps({"step": global_step, "train_loss": avg_loss, "val_exprate": exprate}) + "\n")

         if exprate > best_exprate:

             best_exprate = exprate

     logging.warning(f"Training completed. Best val exprate: {best_exprate:.4f}")
